## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Link to any related issues using `Closes #` or `Fixes #`.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / analysis (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Data update (new model results, corrected data, additional experiments)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality improvement

## Testing Performed
Describe the testing you've done to verify your changes:
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Linting passes (`flake8` and `black --check`)

## Reproducibility Checklist
- [ ] All random seeds are fixed (seed=42)
- [ ] Temperature = 0 for all judge calls
- [ ] Exact model versions are documented
- [ ] Full API parameters are recorded
- [ ] Scripts are self-contained or have documented dependencies

## Documentation
- [ ] Docstrings updated for new/modified functions (NumPy style)
- [ ] Model cards updated if adding models
- [ ] README or CONTRIBUTING updated if adding workflows

## PR Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] I have commented complex code where necessary
- [ ] All analysis results remain reproducible

## Additional Context
Add any context, screenshots, or references that help explain the PR.
